Page n161  c. Maria Manrique. Mariee vers 1190 avec Diego Lopez «elBueno» de Haro, sefior de Vizcaya, sefior de Haro (3e), seitor de Durango (ler), ne vers 1140, decede le 16 septembre 1214 (a l'age de peut-etre 74 ans), conde, senhor de Vizcaya e de Haro

zh.lifeSummary: 當Diego López de Haro II於1152年出生在西班牙拉 利奧亞納拉時，他的父親Lope Díaz I de Haro46歲，母親Aldonça Rodrigues de Castro17歲。他和Toda Pérez de Azagra至少有2個兒子和6個女兒。他去世於1214年9月16日在西班牙艾尤斯卡迪維斯卡亞享年62歲，埋葬在西班牙拉 利奧亞納拉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Diego López de Haro II于1152年出生在西班牙拉 利奧亞納拉时，他的父亲Lope Díaz I de Haro46岁，母亲Aldonça Rodrigues de Castro17岁。他和Toda Pérez de Azagra至少有2个儿子和6个女儿。他去世于1214年9月16日在西班牙艾尤斯卡迪維斯卡亞享年62岁，埋葬在西班牙拉 利奧亞納拉。

nameMeanings.name: López
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Juan, Manuel, Carlos, Luis, Jesus, Francisco, Pedro, Miguel, Jorge, Raul, Ramon, Mario.
Spanish (López): patronymic from the medieval personal name Lope ‘wolf’. This is one of the commonest of all Spanish surnames. In the US, it is the twelfth most frequent surname. Compare De Lopez .

Jewish (Sephardic): adoption of the Spanish surname (see 1 above) at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some descendants retained the name their families used as Catholics.

variants.name: Lopes
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Fernando, Luis, Julio, Mario, Americo, Armando, Jorge, Alvaro, Ana.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Ilidio, Martinho, Paulo, Serafim, Anabela, Duarte, Mateus, Aderito, Afonso, Agostinho.
Portuguese and Galician: patronymic from the medieval personal name Lopo (from Latin lupus ‘wolf’).
Spanish: variant or altered form of López (see Lopez ).

variants.name: Lope
meanings: Spanish: from the old personal name Lope, from Latin lupus ‘wolf’.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Haro
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Jesus, Juan, Luis, Salvador, Manuel, Carlos, Jorge, Miguel, Alberto, Francisco, Jaime.
Spanish: habitational name from a place in the province of La Rioja, so called from a North Castilian form of Spanish faro ‘beacon’. Compare De Haro .
In some cases possibly also French: metonymic occupational name for a peddler, from an Old French cry used to hail someone or to attract attention.

variants.name: De Haro
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Rafael, Arturo, Jaime, Jesus, Ubaldo, Alfredo, Enrique, Felipe, Francisco, Gustavo, Juan.
Spanish: habitational name, formed with the preposition de ‘from’, for someone from a place called Haro (see Haro ).

variants.name: Haros
meanings: Hispanic (mainly Mexico): probably the plural form of Spanish   Haro  .
Greek: variant of   Charos  .

nameMeanings.name: Diego
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Origin uncertain; perhaps from Santiago or from a native Iberian name found in Latin as Didacus.

historicEvents.description: The Christian territory controlled the Kingdoms of Aragon, Navarre, and Castile.

en.lifeSummary: When Diego López de Haro II was born in 1152, in Nájera, La Rioja, Spain, his father, Lope Díaz I de Haro, was 46 and his mother, Aldonça Rodrigues de Castro, was 17. He had at least 2 sons and 6 daughters with Toda Pérez de Azagra. He died on 16 September 1214, in Biscay, Basque Country, Spain, at the age of 62, and was buried in Nájera, La Rioja, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Diego López de Haro II est né en 1152, à Nájera, La Rioja, Espagne, son père, Lope Díaz I de Haro, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Aldonça Rodrigues de Castro, avait 17 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles avec Toda Pérez de Azagra. Il est décédé le 16 septembre 1214, à Biscaye, Euskadi, Espagne, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Nájera, La Rioja, Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Diego López de Haro II 1152 in Nájera, La Rioja, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lope Díaz I de Haro 46 und seine Mutter Aldonça Rodrigues de Castro 17. Er hatte mit Toda Pérez de Azagra mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 16. September 1214 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Vizcaya, Euskadi, Spanien und wurde in Nájera, La Rioja, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Diego López de Haro II è nato il nel 1152 nel Nájera, La Rioja, Spagna, il suo padre, Lope Díaz I de Haro, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Aldonça Rodrigues de Castro, aveva 17 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie con Toda Pérez de Azagra. Morì il 16 settembre 1214, nel Vizcaya, Euskadi, Spagna, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Nájera, La Rioja, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Diego López de Haro IIが1152年にスペインラ リオジャンaジャーアで生まれた時，父Lope Díaz I de Haroは46歳，母Aldonça Rodrigues de Castroは17歳であった。彼はToda Pérez de Azagraとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼は1214年9月16日にスペインエウスカジーヴィズケヤで62歳で死去し，スペインラ リオジャンaジャーアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Diego López de Haro II(이)가 1152년 스페인 라 리오자 aj라에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lope Díaz I de Haro(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Aldonça Rodrigues de Castro(은)는 17세였다. 그는 Toda Pérez de Azagra(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1214년 9월 16일 스페인 우스카디 비즈카야에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 라 리오자 aj라에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Diego López de Haro II nasceu em 1152, em Nájera, La Rioja, Espanha, seu pai, Lope Díaz I de Haro, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Aldonça Rodrigues de Castro, tinha 17 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas com Toda Pérez de Azagra. Ele faleceu em 16 de setembro de 1214, em Biscaia, Euskadi, Espanha, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Nájera, La Rioja, Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Diego López de Haro II родился в 1152 г. в местности нaджира, ла риоджа, Испания, его отцу по имени Lope Díaz I de Haro было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Aldonça Rodrigues de Castro, 17. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей от Toda Pérez de Azagra. Он умер 16 сентября 1214 г. в местности визкеия, эускади, Испания в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности нaджира, ла риоджа, Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Diego López de Haro II nació en 1152, en Nájera, La Rioja, España, su papá, Lope Díaz I de Haro, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Aldonça Rodrigues de Castro, tenía 17 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas con Toda Pérez de Azagra. Murió el 16 de septiembre de 1214, en Vizcaya, País Vasco, España, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Nájera, La Rioja, España.
